title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Marathon Realty

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Marathon Realty
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
